title: Radiology Technician
description: BioNTech is seeking a Radiology Technician to support our clinical and research imaging operations in Boston. You'll operate diagnostic imaging equipment, prepare patients for procedures, and maintain technical standards that enable our groundbreaking biotechnology work. Work with a global leader in mRNA technology advancing personalized medicine.
responsibilities: Operate diagnostic imaging equipment (X-ray, CT, MRI, ultrasound) with precision and safety
Prepare patients for imaging procedures and ensure their comfort throughout
Maintain detailed records of imaging studies and ensure regulatory compliance
Perform equipment maintenance and quality assurance checks
Collaborate with radiologists and clinical staff on imaging protocols

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Radiologic Technology from AERS-accredited program
skills: ARRT certification or eligible for certification
Infection control and patient safety protocols
Ability to follow strict technical imaging standards
Strong attention to detail and documentation

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Continuing education support and certification maintenance
